history.title: Norse cosmology
history.description: "The cosmology of Norse mythology has ""nine homeworlds"" or "" nine realms "", unified by the world tree Yggdrasil. Mapping the nine worlds escapes precision because the Poetic Edda often alludes vaguely. The Norse creation myth tells how everything came into existence in the gap between fire and i
